description: The appliance image contains server/scripts/appliance-create-tenant.mjs.
The bootstrap script starts tenantCreationWorkflow on the local Temporal service.
The workflow adopts a pre-minted appliance tenant id.
The workflow uses the administrator password selected during setup.
Appliance workflow execution skips hosted-only customer tracking and welcome email steps.
Bootstrap retries attach to an existing run and restart only failed executions.
The rendered appliance bootstrap Job invokes the plain .mjs client rather than create-tenant.ts through tsx.
The rendered bootstrap Job receives Temporal address, namespace, and tenant-workflows task queue settings.
An appliance release can build Alga Core and Temporal worker images from one full source revision.
An appliance release publishes charts and Flux config to an immutable reference before promotion.
Release metadata records independent source revisions for Alga Core, Temporal worker, and config/charts.
The coordinated release validates all required image and config digests before promotion.
The stable channel moves exactly once after validation and approval.
A failure before final promotion leaves the previous stable manifest unchanged.
Pointer-only promotion rejects a commit whose changed paths require an absent Temporal worker artifact.
Pointer-only promotion rejects a commit whose changed paths require absent chart or config artifacts.
The current tenant-bootstrap commit is published as a compatible stable appliance release.
A reset local appliance creates its initial tenant through local Temporal.
The locally created tenant id matches the install-code registry tenant id.
The configured initial administrator can log in after Temporal tenant creation completes.
